personas.name: Frugal Mental Health Enthusiast
personas.description: A budget-conscious individual seeking mental health support and tracking tools without incurring significant costs.
goals: Get mental health support without spending money
pain_points: Paywall for advanced help and insights
context: Interested in mental health and wellness

personas.name: Hopeful Helper
personas.description: A person seeking to improve their mental health and wellbeing through tracking and reflection.
goals: to track and understand their mental health
to find convenient and easy-to-use tools for self-reflection
pain_points: struggling with mental health issues such as PTSD
feeling frustrated with some aspects of the app
context: using the app for personal mental health management
constraints: may be experiencing emotional distress or difficulty articulating emotions

personas.name: Mental Health Tracker
personas.description: A person seeking to manage their mental health and emotions using a mobile app.
goals: gain insights into emotions and feelings
find a user-friendly and effective mental health app
pain_points: need for a reliable and professional mental health app
context: using mobile apps for mental health support
seeking a simple and effective tracking solution
constraints: need for a calming and user-friendly interface

personas.name: Hopeful Tracker
personas.description: A mental health-conscious individual seeking to understand and manage their emotions through digital tools.
goals: to easily track and understand their emotions and mental health
to gain insights into their mental state
context: using mental health apps to track emotions and daily tasks
seeking affordable and comprehensive mental health tools
constraints: limited financial resources for mental health tools

personas.name: Disappointed User
personas.description: A user who is frustrated with recent updates to the app.
goals: to use an app that works as expected after updates
context: has experienced issues with app functionality after updates
values privacy and security of personal data
